4
Architecture
app/u/[username]/page.tsx     ← export const revalidate = 60
├── generateMetadata()          ← og:title/description/image from scorecard
├── Left column (60%)
│   ├── ProfileHeader           ← isEditing=false (imported from /profile)
│   └── ScorecardView           ← isPublic=true (imported from Phase 2)
└── Right column (40%)
    ├── VouchesList             ← from scorecard.vouches[]
    └── VouchForm               ← 6-step on-chain flow
Shared component reuse: ProfileHeader and ScorecardView were built in Page 2. This page imports them directly. Zero duplication.
Solana context required: This page uses @solana/wallet-adapter. The WalletAdapterProvider in app/layout.tsx covers this — no extra provider needed here. getPublicScorecard must call apiFetch with skipAuth=true (no Authorization header).
